code: import axios from'axios';import API_BASE from'../config/api';const API_BASE_URL=API_BASE;class ProjectService{getProjectsByCandidate(candidateId){return axios.get("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/candidates/").concat(candidateId,"/projects"),{headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+localStorage.getItem('token')}});}addProject(candidateId,project){return axios.post("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/candidates/").concat(candidateId,"/projects"),project,{headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+localStorage.getItem('token')}});}updateProject(candidateId,projectId,project){return axios.put("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/candidates/").concat(candidateId,"/projects/").concat(projectId),project,{headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+localStorage.getItem('token')}});}deleteProject(candidateId,projectId){return axios.delete("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/candidates/").concat(candidateId,"/projects/").concat(projectId),{headers:{'Authorization':'Bearer '+localStorage.getItem('token')}});}}export default new ProjectService();
